_meta.title: CQB Ink Beats
_meta.description: Cover-test tiers + CQB outcome beats fired from ai.gd during station contact. Phase 3e.

cqb_cover_pass_clean.speaker: narrator
cqb_cover_pass_clean.text: The gate at {station} gave way without a second look. {captain.short_form} kept the invoice-code clean, the papers straight. Nobody asked questions. Your crew exhales at once.

cqb_cover_pass_rough.speaker: narrator
cqb_cover_pass_rough.text: The gate at {station} let you through — but the cameras caught every face. {captain.short_form} felt the weight of it in the corridor after. They'll remember this pass.

cqb_enter.speaker: narrator
cqb_enter.text: The gate at {station} doesn't negotiate. A {alien_archetype} steps from the cover with a {weapon_id} in hand. The grid is {grid_size} by {grid_size}. Your crew draws breath and opens fire.

cqb_end_won.speaker: narrator
cqb_end_won.text: The last alien falls. Your crew stands breathing in the wreckage of the gate. Nobody walks away clean — but everyone walks away. The bond between them holds.

cqb_end_lost.speaker: narrator
cqb_end_lost.text: The fight goes the wrong way. An ally cuts the line — pull back, abort, live to run another day. The station stays. The ledger records a loss.

cqb_end_fled.speaker: narrator
cqb_end_fled.text: You got out, but you left a trace. The {alien_archetype} will remember your ship. Next time, the gate will be harder. This run ends — but the belt doesn't forget.
